generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution 3D LiDAR sensor providing point clouds for object detection and tracking. Implements DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter tracking in DataPreProcessingFE."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData, ProcessedObjectTracks
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "RGB-D depth camera capturing environmental perception data for object tracking and vehicle state estimation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RGBDEnvironmentalData
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor monitoring real-time ego vehicle speed for ACC control and performance analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleSpeedData
]

instance EgoVehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor monitoring real-time steering angle for vehicle state visualization and control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleSteeringAngleData
]

instance VehiclePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor tracking vehicle position for path projection and object relative positioning."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehiclePositionData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data transmitted via ROS2 topics from PTE to DTE for pre-processing."
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Clustered and tracked object data (DBSCAN + Kalman filter) transmitted via ROS2 topics for visualization and control."
]

instance RGBDEnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iCamera
    base:desc "RGB-D environmental data transmitted via ROS2 topics for environmental perception."
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSpeedSensor
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle speed data transmitted via ROS2 topics for ACC computation and monitoring."
]

instance EgoVehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSteeringAngleSensor
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data transmitted via ROS2 topics for vehicle state visualization."
]

instance VehiclePositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehiclePositionSensor
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle position data transmitted via ROS2 topics for path projection and object tracking."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm implemented in DataPreProcessingFE for grouping LiDAR points into objects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation in DataPreProcessingFE for tracking clustered objects across time."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model following ISO 15622 performance class I, computing desired speed based on lead vehicle distance."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time data including ego vehicle state (speed, steering, position) and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleSpeedData, EgoVehicleSteeringAngleData, VehiclePositionData, ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance HistoricalSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series historical data stored in SQL database for reporting and performance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleSpeedData, EgoVehicleSteeringAngleData, VehiclePositionData, ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink-generated data for closed-loop ACC algorithm validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CyberPhysicalExperimentationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based functional entity on PTE implementing point cloud clustering (DBSCAN) and object tracking (Kalman filter)."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, CyberPhysicalExperimentationService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom functional entity handling serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment between ROS2 and external systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node implementing ISO 15622 ACC control logic, offloaded from PT to DTE."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system storing real-time and historical sensor data for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization user interface rendering real-time object tracks and vehicle state in virtual cockpit (Unity/OpenGL)."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity generating human-readable time-series reports from historical data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance CyberPhysicalExperimentationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink and ROS2 integration for closed-loop ACC algorithm validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables CyberPhysicalExperimentationService
]

instance ControlPanelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote control user interface enabling ACC management (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking)."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering), object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight, DrivingPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC computation from PT (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) to DTE to reduce onboard computational burden."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enabling/disabling of ACC, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking via control panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceReportInsight
]

instance CyberPhysicalExperimentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based validation of ACC algorithms using MATLAB/Simulink and ROS2 for closed-loop testing."
    DTDFVocab:provides AlgorithmValidationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and position for performance assessment."
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization and analysis of detected objects (e.g., lead vehicle) in proximity to ego vehicle."
]

instance DrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projection of vehicle's intended path based on current state and object tracks."
]

instance ACCPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of ACC system performance through real-time and historical data analysis."
]

instance PerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports summarizing vehicle state and object tracks over time for post-analysis."
]

instance AlgorithmValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results of ACC algorithms through simulation-based testing in closed-loop environment."
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enabling/disabling of ACC system, adjustment of desired speed, and triggering emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller in lower-level chassis."
]

instance SteeringServoActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls vehicle steering angle based on commands from Digital Twin Entity via servo mechanism in lower-level chassis."
]

// C1: Physical Twin Entity (PTE)
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Onboard entity deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano handling data pre-processing, actuation, and sensor interfacing."
    base:contains DataPreProcessingEnabler, MotorActuationComponent, SteeringServoActuationComponent, EgoVehicleSpeedSensor,
                 EgoVehicleSteeringAngleSensor, VehiclePositionSensor, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelRealSenseD435iCamera
]

// C1: Digital Twin Entity (DTE)
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "External cloud/edge server hosting ACC computation, data storage, and report generation."
    base:contains ACCComputationEnabler, DataStorageEnabler, ReportGenerationEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler,
                 CyberPhysicalExperimentationEnabler
]

// C1: User Entity (UE)
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Separate workstation for 3D visualization and remote control connected via Wi-Fi to DTE."
    base:contains DataVisualizationEnabler, ControlPanelEnabler
]

// C1: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted with autonomy components for ACC digital twinning."
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world include:
  - **Desired speed commands**: Computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the DTE and sent back to the PT for actuation.
  - **Remote management commands**: User-triggered actions such as **enabling/disabling ACC**, **modifying desired speed**, and **emergency braking**, transmitted via the **Control Panel User Interface FE** to the **Actuation FE** in the PTE.
  - **Actuation commands**: Converted into motor voltage and steering servo signals by the **Actuation FE** in the PTE, executed on the **Vedder ESC** and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time time-scale** with the following constraints:
  - **End-to-end latency**: ≤ **100 ms** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication) between the PT and DTE to ensure real-time ACC functionality.
  - **Clock synchronization**: Devices must be synchronized to an accuracy of **±100 ms** to maintain event ordering and data integrity in distributed operations.
  - **Perception cycle**: Object tracks and vehicle state are updated at the **LiDAR scan rate** (typically **10 Hz** for the Hokuyo UST-10LX) and processed in real-time by the DTE."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Entities**:
    1. **Physical Twin Entity (PTE)**: Hosts **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering servo)**, and **data pre-processing** (point cloud clustering/tracking).
    2. **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Hosts **ACC computation**, **data storage (SQL)**, **report generation**, and **visualization pre-processing**.
    3. **User Entity (UE)**: Provides **3D visualization** and **remote control** interfaces.
  - **Communication**:
    - **Intra-vehicle**: ROS2 topics for PTE components.
    - **Inter-entity**: Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP) between PTE, DTE, and UE.
  - **Deployment**:
    - PTE: Onboard **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano**.
    - DTE: External cloud/edge server.
    - UE: Separate workstation with **3D visualization** and **control panel**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle phases of the PT:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for validating ACC algorithms via **MATLAB/Simulink** and **ROS2** simulations.
  - **Development Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **computation offloading**, and **remote management** during system integration and testing.
  - **Operation Phase**: Supports **health monitoring**, **predictive maintenance**, and **fleet optimization** by collecting and analyzing vehicle state data.
  The DT represents the PT **as operated**, with real-time synchronization between the virtual and physical systems."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Achieved via **≤100 ms latency** and **±100 ms clock synchronization** to maintain temporal alignment between PT and DT.
  - **Model validation**: ACC algorithms are validated against **ISO 15622** standards and tested in **closed-loop simulations** using **MATLAB/Simulink**.
  - **Data integrity**: Ensured by the **Data Translation FE**, which performs **unit conversion**, **message alignment**, and **error checking**.
  - **Uncertainty management**: Object tracks are refined using **Kalman filters**, and sensor data is cross-validated between **LiDAR** and **camera** inputs.
  - **Verification**: End-to-end testing includes **latency measurements**, **actuation accuracy**, and **remote command reliability**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the PT and DT includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)** for inter-entity communication, with **ROS2 topics** for intra-vehicle communication.
  - **Latency Requirements**: **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185) to support real-time ACC operations.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices synchronized to **±100 ms accuracy** to ensure event ordering and data consistency.
  - **Data Translation**: Custom **Data Translation FE** handles **serialization**, **unit conversion**, and **message alignment** between ROS2 and external systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across multiple hardware components:
  - **Physical Twin Entity (PTE)**: Deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** onboard the PT, running **ROS2 nodes** for sensor interfacing and actuation.
  - **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Hosted on an **external cloud/edge server**, executing **ACC computation**, **data storage (SQL)**, and **report generation**.
  - **User Entity (UE)**: Deployed on a **separate workstation** with a **3D visualization** interface (e.g., Unity or custom OpenGL) and **control panel** for remote management.
  The system uses **ROS2** for modular communication and **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity connectivity."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is enabled through: **(1) Standardized Interfaces** – **R1** mandates **modular, loosely coupled components** with **standardized communication** (e.g., ROS2, Wi-Fi). **(2) External Data Storage** – **R3** requires data to be stored in an **SQL database** external to the vehicle, enabling integration with **fleet management platforms** or **enterprise systems** (implied by **Abstract**). **(3) Data Translation FE** – Supports interoperability with external systems via **message serialization** and **protocol alignment**. **(4) Potential Extensions** – The architecture could integrate with **V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) systems** or **cloud-based analytics** (as suggested by **Section II.B** for broader automotive DT applications). Specific integrations are not detailed in the case study."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for **Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework**, adapted for automotive use with deviations (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity**, split **User Interface FE**).
  - **ISO 15622**: Standard for **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC)**, implemented as performance class I.
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Latency requirements for **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication** (≤100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for **robotics and autonomous systems**.
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Potential use for **Data Translation FE** (though not explicitly implemented in this case study)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety and security are addressed through:
    - **Real-Time Constraints**: **≤100 ms latency** and **±100 ms clock synchronization** ensure timely and coordinated operations, critical for **safety-critical systems** like ACC.
    - **ISO 15622 Compliance**: The ACC logic adheres to **performance class I** standards, including **emergency braking** functionality to prevent collisions.
    - **Modular Design**: The **entity-based architecture** isolates critical functions (e.g., actuation) from non-critical components, reducing single points of failure.
    The document does not specify **cybersecurity measures** (e.g., encryption, access control) or **hardware redundancy**, though the **remote management** feature includes **emergency braking** as a safety mechanism."
]
